ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of pushing a shopping cart.  The robot will use one arm to mimic this action, while the other arm remains in a relaxed state.  The movement will be smooth but deliberate, reflecting the purposeful nature of shopping.  The single arm will move in an arc, starting from a relaxed position, moving forward and slightly downward to engage the cart, then smoothly returning to the relaxed state. The sequence will consist of five frames to give the movement a natural and fluid feel. Frame 1: Both arms are at rest, neutral position. Frame 2: The right arm moves forward and slightly downward, as if grasping the handle of a shopping cart. Frame 3: The right arm continues its downward motion, simulating the act of pushing. Frame 4: The right arm begins to move back to the starting position. Frame 5: Both arms return to their resting position.

frames.beat: right arm reaches forward, grasping the cart
pushing the cart forward with a steady arm
right arm pulls back, preparing to rest
arms return to a relaxed, neutral pose
